HONCHO_PORT.description: Host loopback port for Honcho's FastAPI service. Bound to 127.0.0.1 — Hermes reads from this loopback for per-LLDAP-user memory peers. Default 8642+10=8652 to leave room next to Hermes' API.

HONCHO_POSTGRES_PORT.description: Host loopback port for Honcho's bundled Postgres (pgvector image). Bound to 127.0.0.1; Honcho is the only consumer. Default 5532 to avoid collisions with an operator-installed Postgres on the standard 5432.

HONCHO_API_KEY.description: Bearer token Hermes' memory plugin sends to Honcho. Auto-generated; the hermes post-deploy reads this back from the credentials manifest and writes it into hermes/config.yaml under memory.honcho.api_key. Regenerate from the wizard if it leaks.

HONCHO_POSTGRES_PASSWORD.description: Auto-generated Postgres password for the Honcho database. Never reused — only the honcho + honcho-postgres containers see it via env vars in this pod.
